traces.prompt: Generate test cases for the registration screen.
traces.response: Test 1: Submit with all fields populated and assert success state surfaces.

traces.prompt: Customer Erika Mustermann reported the form crashes on submit.
traces.response: Reproduce by submitting the form with the registered phone number +49 30 1234567.

traces.prompt: Validate the interest calculator for amounts under 10,000 EUR.
Walk through the rounding rules for negative balances.
Confirm the dashboard loads after a successful login.
traces.response: Acceptance: Given a returning user when they log in then the dashboard renders within 2 seconds and shows their portfolio summary above the fold.

traces.prompt: Cover the IBAN validation edge cases.
traces.response: Test: Reject an IBAN like DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00 that fails the mod-97 check by surfacing the inline error helper.

traces.prompt: Send confirmation to user@example.com when the workflow completes.
traces.response: Test: After the workflow completes, assert the confirmation email is dispatched to the configured recipient address.

traces.prompt: Verify card masking displays only the last four digits.
traces.response: Test: Render the masked PAN component for the registered card 4111 1111 1111 1111 and assert the visible suffix matches the last four digits while the rest is replaced with bullets.

traces.prompt: Cover the case where the optional middle name is omitted.
traces.response: Test: Submit the form with only first name and last name populated and assert the optional middle name is treated as undefined in the persisted payload.

traces.prompt: Cover the case where every optional field is populated.
traces.response: Test: Submit the form with every optional field filled and assert the persisted payload preserves all values without truncation.
